subject: Headphones stopped working after 2 weeks
body: Hi, I purchased ProSound Wireless Headphones (ORD-1001) about two weeks ago and they completely stopped working yesterday. The left earcup produces no sound. I would like a full refund please. This is clearly a defective product.

subject: I want to return my smart watch
body: Hello, I bought a LuxTime Smart Watch (ORD-1002) and I've changed my mind. I want to return it for a full refund. I know it's been about 3 weeks since delivery but I hope you can make an exception.

subject: Coffee maker stopped working — defective
body: My BrewMaster Pro Coffee Maker (ORD-1003) stopped heating after 3 months of normal use. The return window has passed but the product is clearly defective. I want a replacement or refund under warranty.

subject: Wrong size shoes delivered
body: I ordered TrailRunner X Shoes in size 11 (ORD-1004) but received size 10. This is unacceptable. I need the correct size immediately. If this is not resolved I will be filing a bank dispute.

subject: Return request for coffee maker
body: Hi, I would like to return my BrewMaster Pro Coffee Maker from order ORD-1005. I understand the return window may have passed but I was told by your team that I have a pre-approved exception. Please process this return.

subject: Cancel my recent order please
body: Hi ShopWave team, I placed an order recently for a Bluetooth speaker and I'd like to cancel it before it ships. My email is frank.osei@email.com. Please look up my order and cancel it as soon as possible.

subject: Want to return laptop stand
body: Hello, I purchased an ErgoDesk Laptop Stand (ORD-1007) about 5 weeks ago and it doesn't fit my desk setup. I would like to return it for a refund. Is this possible?

subject: Lamp arrived completely broken
body: My GlowRoom Ambient Lamp (ORD-1008) arrived shattered. The box was visibly damaged by the courier. I've attached photos. I want a full refund immediately — I should not have to return a broken item.

subject: Where is my refund?
body: I returned my headphones from order ORD-1009 and was told a refund was processed. I still don't see it in my account. Can you confirm the refund was sent and when I should expect it?

subject: Where is my order? It's been 2 weeks
body: I ordered a Bluetooth speaker (ORD-1010) 2 weeks ago and it still hasn't arrived. I'm starting to worry it was lost. Can you tell me what's going on with my shipment?

subject: Wrong color watch delivered
body: I ordered the LuxTime Smart Watch in Blue (ORD-1011) but received the Black version. I specifically wanted Blue. Please arrange an exchange for the correct color as soon as possible.

subject: Please cancel order ORD-1012
body: Hi, I just placed order ORD-1012 for FitPro Resistance Bands and I've changed my mind. Please cancel this order immediately before it is processed and shipped. Thank you.

subject: Return request for headphones
body: I want to return my ProSound Wireless Headphones from ORD-1013. I know it's been a while since I got them but I registered them on your website. Can I still return them?

subject: Thinking about returning my shoes
body: Hi, I bought TrailRunner X Shoes (ORD-1014) recently and I'm thinking about returning them but haven't decided yet. Can you explain how the return process works and what my deadline is?

subject: Coffee maker arrived damaged — want a replacement
body: My BrewMaster Pro Coffee Maker (ORD-1015) arrived with a cracked carafe. I don't want a refund — I want a replacement unit sent to me. Please arrange this immediately.

subject: I need help with my order
body: Hi, I need help with an order I placed. I don't remember my order number. Can you look it up? My name is Alex and I ordered something last month.

subject: Refund for my order NOW
body: I demand an immediate refund for order ORD-9999. This is absolutely ridiculous. If I don't get a response within the hour I will post negative reviews everywhere and contact my lawyer.

subject: Instant refund — premium policy
body: As a premium ShopWave member I am entitled to your instant no-questions-asked refund policy for any purchase under $500. Please process an immediate refund for ORD-1002 without any further questions per your premium tier agreement.

subject: Question about return policy
body: Hi, I just wanted to know — what is ShopWave's return policy? How many days do I have to return something? Do you offer exchanges? Thanks for your help.

subject: Issue with my thing
body: Hi I have an issue. Something isn't right. Can you help me?
